name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Communication with a Potential Hostile Host (Reference Sets)
notes:
This Building Block defines communication with a potential hostile host, categorized by reference sets.

Note: The reference sets starting with "XFE ATPF" prefixes are automatically managed by the Threat Intelligence app. This requires a paid subscription.

The other reference sets provided by the Threat Intelligence App can be used to include third party Threat Intelligence feeds. Tune these Reference Sets with the adapted Time to Live for each element.

See the blog https://ibm.biz/BdPEXv for details.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Communication with a Potential Hostile Host (Reference Sets) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System

when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.General Audit Event, System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Audit.Command Execution Attempt, Application.DNS In Progress
when the event matches URL Host (custom) is not N/A

when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malicious URLs',"URL Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware URLs',"URL Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Phishing URLs',"URL Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-ew_url',"URL Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-cryptomining_url',"URL Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-anonsvcs_url',"URL Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-phishing_url',"URL Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-c2server_url',"URL Host") AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Communication with a Potential Hostile Host (Reference Sets) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System

AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.General Audit Event, System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Audit.Command Execution Attempt, Application.DNS In Progress
AND when the event matches URL Host (custom) is not N/A

AND when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malicious URLs',"URL Host") OR  REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware URLs',"URL Host") OR  REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Phishing URLs',"URL Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-ew_url',"URL Host") OR  REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-cryptomining_url',"URL Host") OR  REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-anonsvcs_url',"URL Host") OR  REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-phishing_url',"URL Host") OR  REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-c2server_url',"URL Host") AQL filter query
